DEHCImmigrantsSpanish.desc: Ships 1 Outpost Wagon. Spanish immigration boosts XP income, allowing you to earn shipments considerably faster. Upon reaching the Commerce Age, the "Levy" ability can also be used to call groups of powerful Pikemen.\n • The Pikemen do not lose hitpoints.
DEHCImmigrantsSpanish.name: Spanish Immigrants

DEHCImprovedCrossbows.desc: Crossbowmen and Pavisiers gain more range and inflict greater damage to Heavy Infantry and Buildings with their bolts.
DEHCImprovedCrossbows.name: Steel Bolts

DEHCImprovedCrossbowsItalians.desc: Crossbowmen and Pavisiers gain more range and inflict greater damage to Heavy Infantry and Buildings with their bolts.
DEHCImprovedCrossbowsItalians.name: Steel Bolts

DEHCIncaBridgesTeam.desc: TEAM Infantry and civilians move faster, +1 Chasqui.
DEHCIncaBridgesTeam.name: TEAM Inca Bridges

DEHCIncaFortifications.desc: The high ground of Inca buildings grants them additional line of sight and attack range.
DEHCIncaFortifications.name: High Ground

DEHCIndianFriendshipMexican.desc: Native Warriors are trained 10% faster and shipped 50% faster. You get a large Shipment of upgraded Native Warriors from each different allied tribe.
DEHCIndianFriendshipMexican.name: Chimayó Genizarios

DEHCIndianTradeEthiopia.desc: Trade Routes supply more resources and Native Settlements trickle more Influence.
DEHCIndianTradeEthiopia.name: Indian Spice Trade

DEHCInfantryCombatRussian.desc: Poruchik, Rekrut and Strelet attack and hitpoints increased.
DEHCInfantryCombatRussian.name: New Order Regiments

DEHCInfantryGuns.desc: Leather Cannons train faster and are upgraded to Infantry Guns.
DEHCInfantryGuns.name: Light Gun Carriages

DEHCIronmongerEthiopians.desc: Villagers gather Coin from Mines faster.
DEHCIronmongerEthiopians.name: Establish Ironmonger

DEHCItalianBattleshipCard.desc: Ships a mighty Battleship! Enables Italian Battleships to protect nearby warships.
DEHCItalianBattleshipCard.name: Holy League

DEHCIturbidePalace.desc: Town Centers gain a powerful Cannon Attack that does not require garrisoned Settlers to be used.
DEHCIturbidePalace.name: Palace of Iturbide

DEHCJalapenoPeppers.desc: Arrives fast! For a brief period of time, Villagers gather resources significantly faster from Haciendas. Slightly improves rates permanently.\n • Timelimited Boost: Hacienda Gathering +250% for 30 seconds
DEHCJalapenoPeppers.name: Jalapeno Peppers

DEHCJesuitInfluence.desc: You receive Tokens of 200 Influence with all your future shipments, starting with this one.
DEHCJesuitInfluence.name: Jesuit Influence

DEHCKalmarCastle.desc: Ships a Fort Wagon to your town, allowing you to construct a mighty Fort. Fighting nearby your Forts now causes soldiers to yield twice as many experience points.
DEHCKalmarCastle.name: Kalmar Castle

DEHCKingKings.desc: You receive a free pet Lion with all future shipments, starting with this one. Rases gains the "Roar of the Lion!" ability:\n • Roar of the Lion: Increases the movement and attack speed of units nearby any Ras for a short duration.
DEHCKingKings.name: King of Kings

DEHCKnightsBodrum.desc: The Knights of Bodrum ship 1 Hospitaller for each Outpost you have on the map.
DEHCKnightsBodrum.name: Knights of Bodrum

DEHCKnightsMalta.desc: The Knights of Malta ship 5 Hospitallers for each Fort you have on the map.
DEHCKnightsMalta.name: Knights of Malta

DEHCKnightsRhodes.desc: The Knights of Rhodes ship 3 Hospitallers for each Commandery you have on the map.
DEHCKnightsRhodes.name: Knights of Rhodes

DEHCKosciuszkoFortifications.desc: Forts cost less to construct, are built faster and two more may be constructed.
DEHCKosciuszkoFortifications.name: Kosciuszko Fortifications

DEHCLakotaImprovedSiege.desc: Enables Cetan Bowmen to siege buildings from a long-range with their arrows and significantly improves War Clubman siege damage.
DEHCLakotaImprovedSiege.name: Territorial Claims

DEHCLalibelaRockChurch.desc: Ships 1 Mountain Monastery Builder and 1 Abun. Mines within Mountain Monasteries last much longer.
DEHCLalibelaRockChurch.name: Lalibela Rock Church

DEHCLandedGentry.desc: Enables Cavalry Archers to be trained in the Commerce Age and replaces their coin costs with slightly reduced wood costs.
DEHCLandedGentry.name: Landed Gentry

DEHCLandwehr.desc: Crossbowmen are fully replaced with Veteran Landwehrs at the Barracks, Homecity, and on the map. Landwehrs are riflemen that inflict higher base damage at the expense of less bonus damage.
DEHCLandwehr.name: Scharnhorst Reform

DEHCLeatherSoldiers.desc: Changes the Coin cost of Mexican Cavalry and Infantry to Wood. May be sent again to swap back.
DEHCLeatherSoldiers.name: Leather Soldiers

DEHCLiberationMarch.desc: All infantry and cavalry train and move faster.
DEHCLiberationMarch.name: Liberation March

DEHCLombardy.desc: TEAM Ships 1 Lombard Wagon that can transform into a Lombard, an investment building which converts deposited resources.
DEHCLombardy.name: TEAM Lombardy

DEHCLongRifles.desc: Increases the range of State Militia and Minutemen and enables Sharpshooters to be trained in the Commerce Age.
DEHCLongRifles.name: Long Rifles

DEHCLouisianaPurchase.desc: TEAM Ships 1 Covered Wagon which can be built in any age. All existing and newly constructed TEAM Town Centers spawn 3 Bisons.
DEHCLouisianaPurchase.name: TEAM Louisiana Purchase

DEHCMachetes.desc: Insurgente attack and movement speed improved.
DEHCMachetes.name: Machetes

DEHCMachuPicchu.desc: Sends a Stronghold Travois allowing you to construct another mighty Stronghold.
DEHCMachuPicchu.name: Machu Picchu

DEHCMalteseBattleshipCard.desc: Ships a mighty Battleship! Maltese Battleships heal considerably faster when idle.
DEHCMalteseBattleshipCard.name: Morgan's Flagship

DEHCMalteseCombat.desc: Unique Maltese infantry attack and hitpoints increased.
DEHCMalteseCombat.name: Sovereign Order of Malta

DEHCManOfDestiny.desc: Your General now also boosts morale, like the Inspiring Flag. He may also receive Homecity shipments and slowly train Soldados.\n • Inspiring Aura: Does not stack with flag
DEHCManOfDestiny.name: Man of Destiny

DEHCMaraboutNetwork.desc: Reveals the location of all Trading Posts, Treasures, and enemy fortifications on the map.
DEHCMaraboutNetwork.name: TEAM Marabout Network

DEHCMarchRevolution.desc: All German Settlers and Pikemen turn into Revolutionaries and Settler Wagons saddle up as Guard Hussars!
DEHCMarchRevolution.name: March Revolution

DEHCMariachiTeam.desc: Arrives fast! For 30 seconds, all Military Buildings and units go FAST!
DEHCMariachiTeam.name: TEAM Mariachi

DEHCMarvelousYear.desc: Settlers train and work significantly faster for 365 seconds. A marvelous year, Viva España!
DEHCMarvelousYear.name: Marvelous Year

DEHCMedicineWheels.desc: Improves the effectiveness of Healers tasked to the Community Plaza.
DEHCMedicineWheels.name: Medicine Wheels

DEHCMeleeInfCombatInca.desc: Plumed Spearmen, Macemen, War Chief and Chimu Runners attack and hitpoints increased.
DEHCMeleeInfCombatInca.name: Melee Infantry Combat

DEHCMercenaryArmyDutch.desc: Mercenaries arrive, train and move faster, but Dutch infantry and cavalry is now more expensive. Enables Highlanders in Barracks, Royal Horsemen in Stables, and both in Taverns.
DEHCMercenaryArmyDutch.name: Dutch States Army

DEHCMercenaryCampsGerman.desc: Upgrades Taverns into Mercenary Camps that can be built in higher numbers and offer a fixed assortment of German mercenaries, +3 Uhlans.
DEHCMercenaryCampsGerman.name: Mercenary Camps

DEHCMercsBosniaks.desc: Ships a number of Bosniak mercenaries.
DEHCMercsBosniaks.name: Hire Bosniaks

DEHCMercsBosniaksGerman.desc: Ships a number of Bosniak mercenaries. Instead of Uhlans, you get extra Bosniaks.
DEHCMercsBosniaksGerman.name: Hire Bosniaks

DEHCMercsGiantGrenadiersGerman.desc: Ships a regiment of Giant Grenadier mercenaries. Instead of Uhlans, you get extra Giant Grenadiers.
DEHCMercsGiantGrenadiersGerman.name: Potsdam Giants

DEHCMercsMountedRiflemen.desc: Ships a number of Mounted Rifleman mercenaries.
DEHCMercsMountedRiflemen.name: Hire Mounted Riflemen

DEHCMercsOttoman.desc: Ships a number of Ottoman mercenaries: Stradiots, Mamelukes and Corsairs.
DEHCMercsOttoman.name: Ottoman Mercenary Army

DEHCMexicanMint.desc: Ships 500 Coin. Villagers gather coin from all sources faster.
DEHCMexicanMint.name: Mexican Mint

DEHCMexicanStandoff.desc: Outlaw ranged attacks gain a chance to CRITICAL HIT, but will also slightly damage themselves.
DEHCMexicanStandoff.name: Mexican Standoff

DEHCMinutemenCompanies.desc: Ships 10 Minutemen and upgrades the "Levy" ability to "Conscription", which can be used to call upon a larger army of Minutemen, but costs more.
DEHCMinutemenCompanies.name: Minutemen Companies

DEHCMonumentalArchitecture.desc: Monumental Inca architecture increases the hitpoints of buildings and the damage of Town Centers.

DEHCNavalInfantry.desc: Enables Portuguese Warships to train Infantry.
DEHCNavalInfantry.name: Naval Infantry

DEHCNewSpainViceroyalty.desc: Ships 2 Haciendas Wagons which can transform into Haciendas that Settlers may gather resources from, or help spawn Cows, Settlers or powerful Soldados at.
DEHCNewSpainViceroyalty.name: Viceroyalty of New Spain

DEHCNinosHeroes.desc: Every time your General or Padre gets knocked out a Militiaman spawns.
DEHCNinosHeroes.name: Niños Héroes

DEHCNorthernForests.desc: Tremendously improves your Torps at gathering wood by enabling them to gather from more trees as well as further away trees. Also, all existing Torps spawn 3 Trees.
DEHCNorthernForests.name: Great Northern Forests

DEHCNuevoMexico.desc: TEAM Ships 1 Covered Wagon which can be built in any age. All existing and newly constructed TEAM Town Centers spawn 1 Post Wagon.
DEHCNuevoMexico.name: TEAM Nuevo México Territory

DEHCObservers.desc: Salteadores are stronger when nearby natural resources (Trees, Mines, Huntables, etc) and their attacks reveal enemies for a longer duration.

DEHCOldWaysInca.desc: All Special (Big Button) upgrades have their price greatly reduced.
DEHCOldWaysInca.name: Old Ways

DEHCOromoMigrations.desc: Ships 1 Villager. Ships 1 additional Villager for each one you have lost so far this game (up to a maximum of 15).
DEHCOromoMigrations.name: Oromo Migrations

DEHCOttomanBattleshipCard.desc: Ships a mighty Battleship! Ottoman Battleships inflict more damage at the expense of a slower rate of fire.
DEHCOttomanBattleshipCard.name: Mahmudiye

DEHCOutlawsHausa.desc: Desert outlaws move and train faster.
DEHCOutlawsHausa.name: Yawon Dandi

DEHCOxenstiernaReforms.desc: When this Shipment arrives, all of your current Coin is exchanged for a greater amount of Food.
DEHCOxenstiernaReforms.name: Oxenstierna Reforms

DEHCPalaceAmina.desc: Ships 1 Palace Wagon and tokens of 300 Influence. Increases Palace build limit by 1.
DEHCPalaceAmina.name: Palace of Amina

DEHCPapalArsenal.desc: Grants your Papal units powerful charged attacks. Basilica shipments arrive faster.
DEHCPapalArsenal.name: Papal Arsenal

DEHCPapalCompany.desc: Ships a number of Papal Guards and Papal Bombards.
DEHCPapalCompany.name: Papal Company

DEHCPeninsularGuerrillas.desc: Improves Ranged Infantry attack and allows Skirmishers to see the location of enemies they've recently damaged.
DEHCPeninsularGuerrillas.name: Peninsular Guerrillas

DEHCPinatas.desc:
Ships a random selection of resource crates to each member of your team. More resources are delivered if this card is sent in a later age.
 • Age 1: 200 resources
 • Age 2: 400 resources
 • Age 3: 600 resources
 • Age 4: 1000 resources
 • Age 5: 1600 resources
DEHCPinatas.name: TEAM Piñatas

DEHCPioneersItalian.desc: Italian Settler hitpoints, movement speed, and melee damage are increased by this rough type of play.
DEHCPioneersItalian.name: Florentine Football

DEHCPlanAyutla.desc: All your Insurgentes transform into Revolutionaries. Revolutionaries are slightly cheaper and may be trained in batches of up to 10.
DEHCPlanAyutla.name: Plan of Ayutla

DEHCPlanCasaMata.desc: All your Dragoons transform into Chinacos. Hand Cavalry move slightly faster.
DEHCPlanCasaMata.name: Plan of Casa Mata

DEHCPlanMiramare.desc: All your Salteadores transform into powerful French Voltigeurs. Infantry armed with rifles gain more range.
DEHCPlanMiramare.name: Plan of Miramare

DEHCPlanTacubaya.desc: All your Soldados transform into Dragoons. Dragoons are slightly stronger.
DEHCPlanTacubaya.name: Plan of Tacubaya

DEHCPlanTuxtepec.desc: All your Salteadores transform into Soldados. Soldado gain slightly more range.
DEHCPlanTuxtepec.name: Plan of Tuxtepec

DEHCPlanVeracruz.desc: All your Outposts transform into Field Guns. Artillery gain slightly more Line of Sight.
DEHCPlanVeracruz.name: Plan of Veracruz

DEHCPlatoonFire.desc: Caroleans inflict more damage with their ranged attacks, especially to Heavy Cavalry and Shock Infantry.
DEHCPlatoonFire.name: Platoon Fire

DEHCPorfiriato.desc: Arrives fast! Ships 1 Factory Wagon. Factory technologies and repairs are free. Factory hitpoints improved.
DEHCPorfiriato.name: Porfiriato

DEHCPortugueseBattleshipCard.desc: Ships a mighty Battleship! Portuguese Battleships can now heal other ships.
DEHCPortugueseBattleshipCard.name: Nossa Senhora da Conceição

DEHCPortugueseTongue.desc: Ships a Commandery Wagon and a number of powerful Order Cassador. Enables Commanderies to recruit them.
DEHCPortugueseTongue.name: Portuguese Tongue

DEHCPresidialLancers.desc: Chinacos inflict more damage and gain a powerful charged action.
DEHCPresidialLancers.name: Presidial Lancers

DEHCPresidios.desc: Enables Generals to construct Outposts and an extra Fort. All defensive buildings are cheaper and build faster.
DEHCPresidios.name: Presidios

DEHCQueensDragoons.desc: Dragoons inflict more damage and may be recruited in the Commerce Age.
DEHCQueensDragoons.name: Queen's Dragoons

DEHCREVAcehExports.desc: Allows Settler training at the Town Center and grants a steady trickle of Food.
DEHCREVAcehExports.name: Aceh Pepper Exports

DEHCREVAfricanAllies.name: African Roots

DEHCREVAmazonia.desc: Grants a steady trickle of wood. Villagers gather wood faster and trees last longer.
DEHCREVAmazonia.name: Amazonia

DEHCREVAmericanAlliesPeru.desc: Ships 1 Native Embassy Travois and enables you to choose a Native Ally at your Native Embassy. The chosen ally will allow you to recruit Native Warriors and research some of their unique upgrades at the Native Embassy.\n • You may only pick ONE ally
DEHCREVAmericanAlliesPeru.name: American Allies

DEHCREVArgentineMortars.desc: Ships 1 Mortar and upgrades Mortars to Imperial Howitzers.
DEHCREVArgentineMortars.name: Argentine Mortars

DEHCREVBarbaryCombat.desc: Barbary Warrior and Corsair Marksman attack and hitpoints increased.
DEHCREVBarbaryCombat.name: Barbary Combat

DEHCREVBastilleStorming.desc: Sansculotte siege damage and armor increased.
DEHCREVBastilleStorming.name: Storming of the Bastille

DEHCREVBerberNomads.desc: Ships a Berber Nomad villager for each Trading Post and Town Center you control.
DEHCREVBerberNomads.name: Aïr Berbers

DEHCREVBlockhouseCannon.desc: Blockhouses can train Falconets and Mortars.
DEHCREVBlockhouseCannon.name: Blockhouse Cannon

DEHCREVBonifacio.desc: TEAM 1 Prospector Wagon. Mines last longer.
DEHCREVBonifacio.name: Bonifacio

DEHCREVBrazilImporters.desc: Ships 4 Infrastructure Wagons. All shipments arrive considerably faster, including this one.
DEHCREVBrazilImporters.name: Brazilian Importers

DEHCREVBuffaloHunt.desc: TEAM Ships 10 Bison and improves gathering rate from hunted animals
DEHCREVBuffaloHunt.name: TEAM Great Buffalo Hunt

DEHCREVCTrainTimeUS.desc: Unique American unit shipments and units enabled by them arrive and train faster.
DEHCREVCTrainTimeUS.name: American Patriotism

DEHCREVCanadianOfficer.desc: Sends a Canadian Militia Officer who can improve the fighting spirit of Villagers, Militiamen and Native Warriors.
DEHCREVCanadianOfficer.name: Militia Officer

DEHCREVCantinieres.desc: Field Hospitals can be built in greater numbers and generate food. Improves the food gather rate of Sansculottes.
DEHCREVCantinieres.name: Cantinières

DEHCREVCattleDelivery.desc: Ships 8 semi-fattened Cows, 1 Comanchero, and 1 Homestead Wagon.
DEHCREVCattleDelivery.name: Cattle Drivers

DEHCREVCattleDeliveryArgentina.desc: Ships 8 semi-fattened Cows, 1 Gaucho, and 1 Homestead Wagon.
DEHCREVCattleDeliveryArgentina.name: Cattle Drivers

DEHCREVCattleDeliveryBrazil.desc: Ships 8 semi-fattened Cows, 1 Jagunço and 1 Homestead Wagon
DEHCREVCattleDeliveryBrazil.name: Cattle Drivers

DEHCREVCattleDeliveryColombia.desc: Ships 8 semi-fattened Cows, 1 Llanero and 1 Homestead Wagon.
DEHCREVCattleDeliveryColombia.name: Cattle Drivers

DEHCREVCattleDeliveryMexico.desc: Ships 1 Cuerudo, 8 semi-fattened Cows and 1 Homestead Wagon.
DEHCREVCattleDeliveryMexico.name: Cattle Drivers

DEHCREVCharros.desc: Mexican Chinaco attack and hitpoints greatly increased.
DEHCREVCharros.name: Charros

DEHCREVCitizenshipChile.desc: Enables the training of Settler Wagons from Mills and Citizens at Town Centers, +2 Settler Wagons.
DEHCREVCitizenshipChile.name: German Settlements

DEHCREVCitizenshipHaiti.desc: Ships 6 Citizens and enables them at the Town Center. Native Warrior build limit and speed increased.
DEHCREVCitizenshipHaiti.name: Louverture Liberation

DEHCREVClientStates.desc: Receive some Revolutionaries and coin crates unit for each Trading Post you own.
DEHCREVClientStates.name: Client States

DEHCREVColombianNavy.desc: Replaces Caravels with improved Sloops and allows Imperial Age Dock upgrades to be researched.
DEHCREVColombianNavy.name: Colombian Navy

DEHCREVConscriptionCanada.desc: Sends 16 Militiamen and Militiamen no longer lose hitpoints.
DEHCREVConscriptionCanada.name: Permanent Active Militia

DEHCREVContinentalBlockade.desc: Arrives fast! Disables Home City shipments for all enemy and allied players for 4 minutes.
DEHCREVContinentalBlockade.name: Continental Blockade

DEHCREVCorsairCaptain.desc: Ships a powerful Corsair Captain to reave and plunder! He enables your soldiers to gather enemy crates, get greater resource rewards from treasures and yield coin from destroyed ships and buildings (instead of Kill XP).
DEHCREVCorsairCaptain.name: Corsair Captain

DEHCREVCowboys.desc: Ships 10 Cows and 10 Cowboys. Enables Cowboys at Taverns, Stables and Forts.
DEHCREVCowboys.name: Cowboys

DEHCREVCriollos.desc: Ships a number of powerful Musketeers and enables them to be trained at Forts.
DEHCREVCriollos.name: Criollos

DEHCREVCudgelWar.desc: Improves attack and movement speed of hand infantry units trained in Barracks and Blockhouses.
DEHCREVCudgelWar.name: Cudgel War

DEHCREVCultSupremeBeing.desc: You gain more XP from training units and other players receive less XP from defeating yours. Sansculottes gather slightly faster.
DEHCREVCultSupremeBeing.name: Cult of the Supreme Being

DEHCREVDahomeyAmazonsHaiti.desc: Enables Dahomey Amazons to be trained and improves them in combat.
DEHCREVDahomeyAmazonsHaiti.name: Royal Dahomets

DEHCREVDhimma.desc: Ships 6 Settlers and enables Settlers at the Town Center.
DEHCREVDhimma.name: Dhimma

DEHCREVDiamondRush.desc: Ships 1 Prospector Wagon looking for a Diamond Mine.
DEHCREVDiamondRush.name: Diamond Rush

DEHCREVFedMXAmparo.desc: Arrives fast! Settlers spawn quicker and gain significantly more hitpoints.
DEHCREVFedMXAmparo.name: Amparo

DEHCREVFedMXFortuneSoldier.desc: Arrives fast! Defeated enemies now also reward Coin, as well as XP.
DEHCREVFedMXFortuneSoldier.name: Soldier of Fortune

DEHCREVFedMXHenequenIndustry.desc: Haciendas now trickle extra resources in ALL modes.
DEHCREVFedMXHenequenIndustry.name: Henequen Industry

DEHCREVFedMXJungleWarfare.desc: Salteadores, Yucateco Insurgentes, and Holcan Javelineers deal poison damage when attacking.
DEHCREVFedMXJungleWarfare.name: Jungle Warfare

DEHCREVFedMXNuevoLeonMilitia.desc: Ships 2 additional Revolutionaries for each shipment sent so far this game.
DEHCREVFedMXNuevoLeonMilitia.name: Nuevo Leon Militia

DEHCREVFedMXRanching.desc: Ships 2 additional Semi-fattened Cows for each shipment you have sent so far this game.
DEHCREVFedMXRanching.name: California Ranching

DEHCREVFedMXSantamariaFire.desc: Ships 4 Soldados. You receive a free Petard with all future shipments, starting with this one.
DEHCREVFedMXSantamariaFire.name: Santamaria's Fire

DEHCREVFedMXSierraMadreRepublic.desc: Ships 1 Settler for each 3 Revolutionaries you have lost so far this game (up to a maximum of 24).
DEHCREVFedMXSierraMadreRepublic.name: Sierra Madre Republic

DEHCREVFedMXSolisShredders.desc: Haciendas gain a toggle that allows workers to gather Wood.
DEHCREVFedMXSolisShredders.name: Solís Shredders

DEHCREVFedMXTrickleEconomics.desc: Trading Routes generate significantly more resources and Native Settlements now also trickle XP for the entire team.
DEHCREVFedMXTrickleEconomics.name: TEAM Trickle Economics

DEHCREVFedMXYucatecan.desc: Inspiring Flags now also improve Settler gathering rates by 15% and may be placed anywhere on the map you have explored.
DEHCREVFedMXYucatecan.name: Yucatecan

DEHCREVFencibles.desc: Musketeers are upgraded to Fencibles that are stronger, cheaper and have higher range.
DEHCREVFencibles.name: Fencibles

DEHCREVFinnhorses.desc: The sturdy breed of Finnhorses improves the hitpoints of your Stable cavalry.
DEHCREVFinnhorses.name: Finnhorses

DEHCREVFinnishCounterArmy.desc: Enables Russian Counter Dragoons (improved Dragoons) and Counter Jaegers (Schiavone-like infantry) for training in Stables and Barracks or Blockhouses respectively.
DEHCREVFinnishCounterArmy.name: Grand Duchy of Finland

DEHCREVFishingFleet.desc: Ships 1 Dock Wagon. Ships an additional Fishing Boat for each shipment sent so far this game.
DEHCREVFishingFleet.name: Fishing Fleet

DEHCREVGenieTroops.desc: Enables Grenadiers to mine, chop wood and construct a selection of buildings.
DEHCREVGenieTroops.name: Génie Troops

DEHCREVGrandBattery.desc: Ships a battery of powerful artillery units.
DEHCREVGrandBattery.name: Grand Battery

DEHCREVGuano.desc: Trading Posts generate half a coin per second. Villagers gather Coin from Mines faster, +2 Prospector Wagons.
DEHCREVGuano.name: Guano Economy

DEHCREVGuillotine.desc: You receive a fraction of food and coin for economic units you have lost so far. Sansculottes inflict more damage against hero units.
DEHCREVGuillotine.name: Guillotine

DEHCREVGunboats.desc: Researches Imperial Monitors and grants your Caravels the Long-range bombardment ability.
DEHCREVGunboats.name: Gunboats

DEHCREVHaitianBattleshipCard.desc: Ships a mighty Battleship with a Pirate crew inside! Haitian Battleships can train Outlaws and pets.
DEHCREVHaitianBattleshipCard.name: Brethren of the Coast

DEHCREVHorseHunters.desc: Dragoons inflict more damage to cavalry and take less time to train.
DEHCREVHorseHunters.name: Horse Hunters

DEHCREVHuguenots.desc: Enables Huguenots (Coureur des Bois) to be trained from Town Centers. Permits you to train 30 Coureurs in addition to the usual Villager build limit.
DEHCREVHuguenots.name: Huguenots

DEHCREVHundredDays.desc: Sends a Musketeer for each unit you lost (up to 100), but Musketeers become notably weaker.
DEHCREVHundredDays.name: Hundred Days

DEHCREVImmigrantsEuropean.desc: Ships a large group of European villager units and slightly increases the XP trickle.
DEHCREVImmigrantsEuropean.name: European Immigrants

DEHCREVImperialOldGuard.desc: Significantly improves Grenadier resistances and melee combat.
DEHCREVImperialOldGuard.name: Imperial Old Guard

DEHCREVJuninHussars.desc: Hand cavalry trains and moves faster.
DEHCREVJuninHussars.name: Junín Hussars

DEHCREVKratonGuards.desc: Improves Revolutionaries and Pikemen units in combat.
DEHCREVKratonGuards.name: Kraton Guards

DEHCREVLantakas.desc: Improves attacks of ships, buildings and artillery.
DEHCREVLantakas.name: Lantakas

DEHCREVLegionArtillery.desc: Sends some powerful artillery. Improves artillery hitpoints and train time, particularly Culverins.
DEHCREVLegionArtillery.name: Knox's Continental Artillery

DEHCREVLegionCarbines.desc: Sends some Carbine Cavalry. Fully replaces the Light Ranged Cavalry of your civilization with Carbine Cavalry.
DEHCREVLegionCarbines.name: Lee's Continental Light Dragoons

DEHCREVLegionGrenadiers.desc: Sends some powerful Grenadiers with Grenade Launchers and enables them at Forts. Activates Grenade Launchers for your civilization.
DEHCREVLegionGrenadiers.name: Washington's Continental Grenadiers

DEHCREVLegionIronPetards.desc: Sends some Stealth Petards. Allows your Petards and Ironclads to use Stealth.
DEHCREVLegionIronPetards.name: Bushnell's Continental Sappers

DEHCREVLegionRegulars.desc: Sends some Regulars. Fully replaces Musketeers with Guard Regulars.
DEHCREVLegionRegulars.name: Haslet's Continental Regiment

DEHCREVLegionSpies.desc: Sends some Spies. Upgrades them to Knowlton Rangers, which have greatly increased line of sight, hitpoints and can use rifles.
DEHCREVLegionSpies.name: Knowlton's Continental Rangers

DEHCREVLegionUhlans.desc: Sends some powerful Uhlans. Reduces the training and upgrade costs of your Hussars.
DEHCREVLegionUhlans.name: Pulaski's Continental Cavalry

DEHCREVLetterOfMarque.desc: Passes a law which permits Pirates to carry firearms, gather from crates and loot treasures. Pirates and Privateers loot treasures more thoroughly than other units and Privateers now also provide a steady flow of coin obtained from piracy. Arrrr!
DEHCREVLetterOfMarque.name: Letter of Marque

DEHCREVLima.desc: Ships 1 Cathedral Wagon. Cathedrals generate Experience at a much faster rate.
DEHCREVLima.name: Lima

DEHCREVLongRifles.desc: Increases the range of several units armed with rifles.
